description: This shoebox is much messier than Fred's. Loose threads and lint balls are scattered everywhere. Your neighbor, a grumpy old boot, is currently napping in the corner.

floor.description: A floor covered in lint and loose threads.

exit_west.description: The crack leads back to your own shoebox.

edge_n.description: A hole in the ceiling leads up to the Shoe Rack.

exit_east.description: A door leads east out to the garden path.

npc_neighbor.description: A grumpy old boot is snoring loudly.

dialogue.text: "Zzz... keep it down... some of us are trying to hibernate... zzz..."
"You again, Fred? Still screaming at the moon? Bah! And that karaoke party last night was intolerable! When I was your age, we only screamed at things that deserved it, like muddy puddles!"
"If you're looking for your lunch, I saw a suspicious shadow heading toward the south gates. Now bugger off!"
